summary: Phase 3D: Retry + Dead-Letter Governor (Deterministic). Creates lcs.retry_queue (SUPPORTING, CTB-registered, partial unique index for one active item per entity). Extends lcs.lcs_errors with is_retryable/retry_strategy columns. Creates fn_enqueue_retry (idempotent, deterministic next_attempt_at from strategy). Creates fn_process_retry_batch (SKIP LOCKED, routes EMISSION→fn_promote_emission / MID→fn_mark_mid_ready, escalates IMMEDIATE→BACKOFF_5M→BACKOFF_1H→BACKOFF_1D, DEAD at max_attempts). Creates v_dead_letter_queue (DEAD items with error context). lcs_worker EXECUTE-only. No RAISE-after-DML. 14 enforcement tests across 5 categories.
